mapper.sql: id, username, password_hash, real_name, email, phone, avatar_url, status, last_login_at, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted
mapper.select: select from sys_user where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select from sys_user where username = #{username} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1

select from sys_user where is_deleted = 0
and (username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and status = #{status}
order by created_at desc

select distinct u.id, u.username, u.real_name, u.email, u.created_at from sys_user u inner join sys_user_role bur on bur.user_id = u.id inner join sys_role br on br.id = bur.role_id where u.is_deleted = 0 and u.status = 'ACTIVE' and br.role_code in ('USER', 'PROJECT_MANAGER', 'TEAM_MEMBER', 'READ_ONLY') and not exists ( select 1 from sys_user_role sur inner join sys_role sr on sr.id = sur.role_id where sur.user_id = u.id and sr.role_code = 'SYS_ADMIN' ) order by u.created_at desc
mapper.update:
update sys_user
username = #{username},
password_hash = #{passwordHash},
real_name = #{realName},
email = #{email},
phone = #{phone},
avatar_url = #{avatarUrl},
status = #{status},
updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}
where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
